generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how outdated security laws put us at risk. The 2024 London attacks showed what happens when agencies can't act preemptively. We need to empower our security services with modern tools to stop threats before they materialize. Civil liberties groups often raise concerns, but the real threat is doing nothing while dangers grow. #NationalSecurityFirst
